sentences.arabic: الذَّكَاءُ الِاصْطِنَاعِيُّ هُوَ تِقْنِيَّةٌ حَدِيثَةٌ جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Vještačka inteligencija je veoma moderna tehnologija.
sentences.translationEn: Artificial intelligence is a very modern technology.

sentences.arabic: تَسْتَخْدِمُهُ الْكَثِيرُ مِنَ الْبَرَامِجِ لِحَلِّ الْمُشْكِلَاتِ الصَّعْبَةِ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi programi je koriste za rješavanje teških problema.
sentences.translationEn: Many programs use it to solve difficult problems.

sentences.arabic: هُوَ يَجْعَلُ حَيَاتَنَا أَسْهَلَ وَأَسْرَعَ مِنْ قَبْلُ.
sentences.translation: Ona čini naš život lakšim i bržim nego prije.
sentences.translationEn: It makes our lives easier and faster than before.
